titleStmt.title: SII 19.112: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 112. (A.R. No. 102 of 1929.) LĀLGUḌI, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, SAPTARISHĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 15 kaḻañju of gold with which were purchased 90 sheep, for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruttavattuṟai in Iḍaiyāṟṟu-nāḍu, by Araiyaṉ Ayyāṟṟaḍigaḷ of Ovaichchēri a hamlet of Brahmapurinallūr in Maḻanāḍu on behalf (in memery) of his parents Śūlapāṇi Ōvaraiyar and Kuvāvaṉ Tiruvaḍi. This is probably an inscription of Parāntaka I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 4- lāvatu Iṭaiyāṟṟunāṭṭu tiru
ttavattuṟai mahādevarkku ṉicatappaṭi Iravum pakalum tiruṉoṉtātiruviḷak keriva tāka maḻanā
ṭṭup piramapurinallūrk kaṇṭattu Ovaicceri yovaraiya ṉayyāṟṟaṭikaḷeṉ Eṅkaṇa
ccūlapāṇi yovaraiyākkum Eṅkaḷammai kuvāvaṉ ṟiruvaṭi yaiyuñ cātti vaitta ṉo
ntāviḷakkiṉukku vaitta poṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu Ippoṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcuṅ kuṭuttu koṇ
ṭacāvāmuvāp perāṭuāka vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟu Ivvāṭṭāl nicata Uḻakku ney
cantirātittava lerivatāka vaitteṉ Araiyaṉaiyyāṟṟaṭikaḷeṉ Itu paṉmāhēśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 19.112 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
